topics: Block diagram of 8051 - Program Status Word (PSW), Accumulator, Program Counter, Memory organization (RAM and ROM), Register banks and stack
Classification of instruction set - Data transfer, Arithmetic, Logical, and Branching groups
Addressing modes - Types; Accessing data from internal and external memory
Introduction to 8051 assembly language programming, data types and directives, concept of subroutine, software delay programming
Programming 8051 using Embedded C Language: Introduction to Embedded C - advantages
Configuration of timer registers, timer mode programming, counter mode
Serial Communication in 8051: Modes and protocols, RS-232 pin configuration and connection
Serial port programming - Transmitting and receiving
Programming the interrupts: External, timer, and serial port interrupts; Interrupt priority settings

Suggested Project Topics: (1) Interface ADC chip to 8051 microcontroller, read voltage variation from potentiometer, display on LCD; (2) Interface DAC chip to 8051 microcontroller, generate 1KHz sine waveform at port pin; (3) DC motor interface for speed and direction control; (4) Stepper motor interface - unit step control, rotation angle control, speed control, direction control; (5) Read temperature sensor and display on LCD
